title: Akbar Birbal
subTitle: Clever Birbal aids Emperor Akbar in witty adventures, solving puzzles and delivering justice across Mughal India, unfolding tales of wisdom and humor.

title: Mahabharat
subTitle: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Kaptaan
subTitle: Kaptaan, a lawyer, is challenged to prove himself to an unrequited childhood love and his father to obtain his permission to get married.

title: Race
subTitle: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.

title: Bro
subTitle: An arrogant young man meets his end in a fatal car accident and meets the god of time. While the god grants him three months to set his life in order, the man realises the error of his previous ways.

title: Navsari Ka Rahasya
subTitle: Soon after moving into their new palatial house, a couple begins experiencing paranormal phenomena. An investigation leads them to the chilling story of the house's previous inhabitants.

title: Entertainment
subTitle: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Jack N Jill
subTitle: Kesh, a brilliant scientist, and his robot take on the task of completing his father's dream invention, which drastically increases the mental capacity of a human brain.

title: Freaky Ali
subTitle: Ali, an extortionist debt collector, decides to leave his murky past behind to pursue a new career in golf, a sport for which he has a natural talent.

title: Bachchan Pandey
subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

title: Alludu Adhurs
subTitle: A young man named Sreenu swears off women following a failed relationship. However, he falls in love with a gangster's daughter and is even forced to compete with another man for her hand in marriage.

title: Double Dhamaal
subTitle: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.

title: Escape of Shark
subTitle: After a tsunami suddenly attacks, a beach party turns into a nightmare as the hotel is submerged in the sea. All the partygoers must find a way to survive when a giant shark starts hunting them.

title: Mega Crocodile
subTitle: A researcher is commissioned to search for a missing person on the Hell Island full of crocodiles but soon find themselves endangered when giant crocodiles begin threatening their lives.

title: Qatil Saya
subTitle: A police officer investigates the mystery behind unnatural deaths after taking charge of his new post at a hill station.

title: Om Jai Jagadish
subTitle: Divided by ideologies, yet bound by love, three brothers end up going their separate ways. Fate offers them another chance to be together when their family home is on the brink of foreclosure.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
subTitle: A television channel decides to host a reality show in a haunted house with seven contestants. The ghosts, however, have their own motives and obstruct the organisers' plans.

title: The Return of Raju
subTitle: A widow decides to seek the help of her husband's spirit when she sees the marital life of her son shattering in front of her.

title: Players
subTitle: A master thief stumbles upon a secret lead about a shipment of gold ingots being transported from Russia to Romania. Eventually, he recruits a gang of sly criminals to stage a daring heist.

title: Power Play
subTitle: Vijay, a young man, convinces his family to let him marry Keerthy. However, their wedding plans are jeopardised when he is accused of a scam.
